Tip of the day
Equipping a gear set while at a bank will automatically withdraw all the items from the bank.

Coral chest

Coral chest
Type: Container
Keyword: Chest

Multi-coloured corals in the shape of chest. It's moving as if it would be underwater.

Coral chest is an openable treasury item. It can be dropped from most activities in Syrenthia. They can have the odds of finding them increased with the Chest Finding equipment attribute.

Loot Tables

These are the sub-tables for the various materials, coins, and items that can come from these chests.

These treasury items make 4 independent loot rolls when they are opened.

Main Loot Table

95.000% Per Roll (99.999% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Pearls 1 27.143% 71.824% ~1 in 1 22 (22)
Sea shell 6-12 27.143% 71.824% ~1 in 1 5 (30-60)
Coral 3-5 13.571% 44.200% ~1 in 2 4 (12-20)
Kelp 3-5 13.571% 44.200% ~1 in 2 4 (12-20)
Salty hops 1-2 13.571% 44.200% ~1 in 2 2 (2-4)

Uncommon Loot Table

5.000% Per Roll (18.549% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Coral cape 1 5.000% 18.549% ~1 in 5 7 (7)

Sources

Activity Drops

Activity Name Skills Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
Cave diving Mining lvl. 55
Agility lvl. 55
Foraging lvl. 55		 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 375,000 steps 163,250 steps
Coral cutting Woodcutting lvl. 45 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 30,000 steps 15,000 steps
Drift net hunting Hunting lvl. 30
Fishing lvl. 25		 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 59,250 steps 37,250 steps
Fossil mining Mining lvl. 35 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 125,000 steps 89,500 steps
Kelp foraging Foraging lvl. 35
Woodcutting lvl. 35		 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 27,500 steps 13,750 steps
Merfolk dancing Agility lvl. 30 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 75,000 steps 37,500 steps
Merfolk farm foraging Foraging lvl. 40 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 25,000 steps 13,250 steps
Mine volcanic rock Mining lvl. 45 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 31,250 steps 16,500 steps
Predator fishing (Spear) Fishing lvl. 55
Hunting lvl. 45		 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 62,500 steps 28,500 steps
Sea fishing (Spear) Fishing lvl. 30 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 31,250 steps 16,500 steps
Underwater basket weaving Crafting lvl. 40 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 75,000 steps 41,750 steps
Underwater swimming Agility lvl. 50 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 37,500 steps 18,000 steps
Wreck diving Foraging lvl. 35
Agility lvl. 35		 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 250,000 steps 139,000 steps

‡W.E.A.R is a value that shows the average steps for one item at maximum work efficiency.
